title: Wrong number of results returned
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ruian_AdresniMisto (amnumber TEXT, psc TEXT, cisloD INTEGER, cisloO INTEGER);
INSERT INTO ruian_AdresniMisto (amnumber, psc, cisloD, cisloO) VALUES ('AM001', '12345', 1, NULL);
INSERT INTO ruian_AdresniMisto (amnumber, psc, cisloD, cisloO) VALUES ('AM002', '12345', NULL, 2);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT amnumber) FROM ruian_AdresniMisto WHERE psc IS NOT NULL;
SELECT amnumber, COUNT(*) FROM ruian_AdresniMisto GROUP BY amnumber HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
key_bug_features: Count distinct results returns incorrect total
